name: mena-inc-eccomerce
description: Lead-generation storefront + operations admin panel for **Mena INK Trading PLC** (Addis Ababa). Customers browse the catalog, build an order summary, and send it in one tap via **WhatsApp** or **Telegram** — no online payment. Every order lands in the database, is delivered to the team on the chosen channel, and triggers an admin push notification.
